# Regex fixtures for skill: verification-before-completion
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# NO_MATCH lines pin word boundaries on the SHIP alternation: embedded ship
# (relationSHIP) and embedded tag (sTAGing, unTAGged) must not fire.

MATCH: ready to merge this branch
MATCH: ship it
MATCH: all tests green lets wrap up
MATCH: tag the release and publish the plugin
MATCH: we shipped the fix
MATCH: we merged and completed the work
MATCH: release the new version

NO_MATCH: the relationship between hooks and registry is unclear
NO_MATCH: the staging environment is flaky today
NO_MATCH: untagged resources in gcp
NO_MATCH: a pattern emerged in the logs
NO_MATCH: the docs are incomplete
NO_MATCH: there is unfinished work in this branch
NO_MATCH: pin the prerelease dependency for now
NO_MATCH: this query is already too slow
